creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
Updatin port graphics/libfpx version libfpx-1.2.0.12_2  to version 1.3.1-1 ends up in the following error when using CLANG as the compiler:

[with CLANG 3.2]
clang++  -O3 -pipe -march=native -DHAVE_WCHAR_H -DHAVE_DLFCN_H -DHAVE_SYS_TIME_H -DHAVE_SYS_PARAM_H -DHAVE_SYS_MOUNT_H -Qunused-arguments -fstack-protector -Werror -Wall -Wno-format-y2k -W -Wno-unused-parameter -Wpointer-arith -Wno-uninitialized -Wno-empty-body -Wno-string-plus-int -Wno-tautological-compare -Wno-unused-value -Wno-parentheses-equality -Wno-unused-function -Wno-conversion -fno-rtti -fno-exceptions -fno-strict-aliasing -DHAVE_WCHAR_H -DHAVE_DLFCN_H -DHAVE_SYS_TIME_H -DHAVE_SYS_PARAM_H -DHAVE_SYS_MOUNT_H -I/usr/ports/graphics/libfpx/work/libfpx-1.3.1-1/oless/h -I/usr/ports/graphics/libfpx/work/libfpx-1.3.1-1/jpeg -I/usr/ports/graphics/libfpx/work/libfpx-1.3.1-1/ole -I/usr/ports/graphics/libfpx/work/libfpx-1.3.1-1/basics -I/usr/ports/graphics/libfpx/work/libfpx-1.3.1-1/ri_image -I/usr/ports/graphics/libfpx/work/libfpx-1.3.1-1/oless -I/usr/ports/graphics/libfpx/work/libfpx-1.3.1-1/fpx -I/usr/ports/graphics/libfpx/work/libfpx-1.3.1-1/. -I/usr/local/include -D_UNIX -c /usr/p
 orts/graphics/libfpx/work/libfpx-1.3.1-1/fpx/fpximgvw.cpp -o fpximgvw.o
In file included from /usr/ports/graphics/libfpx/work/libfpx-1.3.1-1/fpx/fpximgvw.cpp:16:
/usr/ports/graphics/libfpx/work/libfpx-1.3.1-1/fpx/fpximgvw.h:302:23: error: private field 'sourceStorage' is not used
      [-Werror,-Wunused-private-field]
        OLEStorage*   sourceStorage;    // Source FPX Image storage
                      ^
/usr/ports/graphics/libfpx/work/libfpx-1.3.1-1/fpx/fpximgvw.h:303:23: error: private field 'resultStorage' is not used
      [-Werror,-Wunused-private-field]
        OLEStorage*   resultStorage;    // Result FPX Image storage
                      ^
2 errors generated.
*** [fpximgvw.o] Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/graphics/libfpx/work/libfpx-1.3.1-1.
*** [do-build] Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/graphics/libfpx.
** Command failed [exit code 1]: /usr/bin/script -qa /tmp/portupgrade20121012-15074-1ceztbo env UPGRADE_TOOL=portupgrade UPGRADE_PORT=libfpx-1.2.0.12_2 UPGRADE_PORT_VER=1.2.0.12_2 make
